title: Stable Armor Stands
description: Rename your armor stands to make them even more acrobatic and useful in building!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f71e3cedced05ac05f77825a94a3170808b52ae.png)

The pack requires Optifine or ETF and EMF. It is also recommended to use any mod or datapack that lets you modify armor stands, like armor statues mod or the Vanilla Tweaks datapack

I think most of you know that the rotation of the armor stand torso is a bit weird, like this
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a7fcc597a5de573262b844d2e3dceae9699c983.png)

Well, with this pack, not anymore! With Stable Armor Stands, you'll be able to connect the body and the legs of the armor stand in a more realistic anatomy by just renaming it to "stable"

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4a839bf0e51c42fa1ef7a89795b2c8a40bffc96.png)

In addition, for those of you who use player styled armor stands, you can rename your stands to "solid"! And by going into the pack files, you'll be able to change the wooden texture to any skin you like!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8535b0a92c07e44794752de9e06158025d5c6e36.png)

Not enough for the your project? How about 4 more! By adding a number from 2 to 5 after "solid" your armor stand will change texture to one of the place holders that you can modify in the folder.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60e3fd0eb700cc5f6a4c7863c75bd6f5652b2c82.png)

Searching something creepier? By renaming an armor stand "fragile" it will become a skeleton, perfect for abandoned structures.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24fbead1e6801d6a67787f623ca9ca830ed2a44b.png)

It's also slightly compatible with the Straw Statues mod, but it's not as relevant because those are well made in comparison to the vanilla armor stands and can actually do better than the stable version

To see everything in action, here's a [video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tpqkm63zciM)  that will show you EVERYTHING, from the addition to the bugs!

#
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e73dac2fd38ce35a33a92cd1a479e735becdc789.png)

The pack is intended for builing and map making: no one of the new armor stands will equip items properly and i'll unlikely fix this issue. But you can use this pack freely (with credit so not so freely) in any of your maps to make even better looking armor stand animations (if you know how to use /data right, because i can't)

[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4249df9f0ef6abe842bb7a97ee403bafbcc382ff.png)](https://www.optifine.net/home)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd794c4c532e3b59c595681b76fac63f06b64a35.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49a906d9980b9fe07789bec063da72ac88e16599.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
